# custom_process_length_calc_type_index

| Source type / method | Source location | KSY type / field | KSY location | Resolved |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `gen_row` | `input/gen_test.py` | root `seq.blocks` + `types.block.values` | `output/custom_process_length_calc.ksy` | Yes |
| `BitCount.decode` | `output/bit_count.py` | `types.processed_bit_count.bit_count` (`process: bit_count`) | `output/custom_process_length_calc.ksy` | Yes |
